items.title: Welcome to the Security Center
items.body: This is where CyberCleanerPro posts security alerts, protection tips, and new-feature news. Check back regularly to stay protected.

items.title: Run a Deep Scan every week
items.body: Open AI Security Scan and choose Deep Scan to check Tamper Protection, drive encryption, suspicious processes and startup load.

items.title: Stay alert for phishing emails
items.body: Never click links in unexpected emails. Use the Email Intelligence tab to check suspicious messages before you act.
